job.SEOTITLE: Job - Aws Devops Engineer -  - Capgemini - 5-to-10 years of experience - Jobs India
job.jobDesc:
About the role

We are looking for an experienced AWS DevOps Engineer to join our growing cloud infrastructure team. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and managing scalable cloud solutions, automating deployment pipelines, and ensuring high availability of production systems.


Responsibilities:

  • Design, deploy, and manage AWS infrastructure using Terraform and CloudFormation (IaC)
  • Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or AWS Code Pipeline
  • Containerize applications using Docker and orchestrate with Kubernetes (EKS)
  • Monitor system health using CloudWatch, Prometheus, and Grafana; set up alerting and on-call runbooks
  • Implement AWS security best practices IAM, VPC, Security Groups, WAF, and Secrets Manager
  • Automate repetitive operations using Bash, Python, or Ansible scripts
  • Collaborate with development teams to embed DevOps culture and shift-left testing
  • Perform root-cause analysis for production incidents and implement permanent fixes

Requirements"

  • 4+ years of hands-on experience with AWS cloud services (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, EKS, CloudFront)
  • Strong proficiency in infrastructure-as-code using Terraform or AWS CloudFormation
  • Experience with container technologies: Docker, Kubernetes / EKS
  • Good understanding of networking concepts — VPC, subnets, route tables, load balancers
  • Familiarity with agile / scrum methodology and tools like Jira or Confluence
  • AWS Solutions Architect Associate or DevOps Professional certification is a plus
job.companyProfile:
Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem. The Group reported 2023 global revenues of 22.5 billion (Euro).

Capgemini in India comprises nearly 175,000 team members working across 13 locations: Bangalore, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Coimbatore, Gandhinagar, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Mumbai, Noida, Pune, Salem and Tiruchirappalli.

Get The Future You Want | Learn more about Capgemini in India at www.capgemini.com/in-en.
